results.title: Phenotypic response surface-guided pharmacotherapy for personalized combination treatment in complex diseases.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 41992855. 2026/04/01 00:00. BACKGROUND: Virtual implant planning systems integrate (cone beam-) computed 
tomography data to assess bone quantity and virtual models for the design of the 
implant-retained prosthesis and drill guides. Five commercially available 
systems for virtual implant planning were examined regarding the modalities of 
integration of radiographic data, virtual dental models and the design of drill 
guides for guided implant surgery. The purpose of this review was
